svg.text: PAN027 maternal haplotype vs PAN010: old/source vs native odgi and sweepGA views

Rows are PAN027#1 query arms; x-axis is each 500 kb telomere-anchored flank. Color encodes PAN010 target arm. Thin sublanes show nth-best ranks; red outlines flag bins where a regenerated view lacks the old first-best target arm.
